meta.title: CV - Oscar Miguel Toro Torres | Software Engineer
sidebar.about.title: About Me
sidebar.about.text: Senior software engineer with 10+ years of experience developing high-impact enterprise and financial solutions. Currently at Banco Supervielle (Argentina), specialized in cloud-native architectures, microservices, and distributed systems with .NET Core, Angular, Flutter, GCP, and AWS. Proven track record implementing Clean Architecture, CQRS/DDD, and Event-Driven patterns in mission-critical production environments. Expert in AI/ML integration (Vertex AI), DevOps automation (CI/CD, Kubernetes), and optimization of high-concurrency systems. Certified Scrum Master with a strong focus on quality, scalability, and continuous value delivery.

main.experience.title: Work Experience
main.exp1.role: Lead Full-Stack Developer - Banco Supervielle – Intive
main.exp1.desc:
• Backend: RESTful APIs and microservices with .NET Core 6.0/8.0 (Clean Architecture, CQRS + MediatR, Entity Framework Core, OAuth 2.0), serverless AWS Lambda functions with Python 3.11, RabbitMQ and AWS SQS integration for asynchronous messaging.
• Frontend: Angular 12+ with NgRx for state management, PrimeNG/Material UI, testing with Cypress/Jasmine.
• Mobile: Clean/DDD architecture in Flutter/Dart with Go backend (GCP Cloud Functions), Firebase (Auth/Firestore), Riverpod, Google APIs (Gmail, Sheets, Drive), AES-256/JWT security.
• Cloud/DevOps: AWS (Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, SQS, API Gateway, EC2, Cognito, KMS), GCP (Cloud Functions, Vertex AI, APIs), Firebase, Kubernetes (k3s/k8s), Keycloak, Docker, GitLab CI/CD, IBM API Connect, SonarQube.
main.exp1.projects: • Projects: Online Banking for Businesses (merchant enrollment, digitization, collections with mass direct debits), Service Portal (QR, electronic payments, POS terminals). View site
main.exp2.desc:
• Platforms: Rancher, Consul, Sonar, Kibana, Jira, Confluence, GitLab
• SCRUM, CI/CD Azure DevOps, Azure Portal, PostgreSQL, ASP.NET Core, Angular
main.exp2.projects: • Project: CEDULA RURAL - Rural development management system. View site
main.exp3.desc:
• Front-End: Angular, HTML5, CSS3, JS, JQuery, Bootstrap, SASS
• Back-End: C# ASP.NET Core, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Jira, BitBucket
main.exp3.projects:
• Projects: ARCHIVO SINDICAL - Labor union management system. View site
• PAIWEB 2.0 - Vaccination management system. View site
main.exp4.desc:
• Front-End: JS, JQuery, Kendo UI, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap
• Back-End: C# .Net Core, PL/SQL Oracle, SCRUM, documentation
main.exp4.projects: • Project: SALUD.SIS - Design and development of integrated health management system. View site
main.exp5.desc: • Unit testing NUnit C#, PL/SQL queries, TFS Visual Studio
main.exp6.desc:

• SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SCRUM
